room.caption: [CCityNorthWest] Still technically part of the north.

instance.creationCode: y+=32 type=1 growDist=208 targetNPC=(GID(216222)) if global.gameProgress<=1520 {instance_destroy()}
bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=48 newMapY=512 toRoom=rCCity_NB_S1a if global.gameProgress<=1020 instance_destroy()
sprite_index=sNormalDoor bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=3024 newMapY=336 toRoom=rMain_20 colorChange=1

talker="Phil" stringToShow="There are people out there that are actively trying to take the program down. I just don't get it, man." boxSize=2 image_blend=make_color_rgb(180,255,180) image_xscale=-1 if global.gameProgress<=1520 {instance_destroy()}

talker="Ned" stringToShow="They argue that the program itself is oppressive, but once it announced its agreement to stay out of human affairs, it backed off. Heck, it even created this huge mass of land for us to expand and build upon." boxSize=3 image_blend=make_color_rgb(180,180,255) if global.gameProgress<=1520 {instance_destroy()}

sprite_index=sNPC_D_Idle talker="Old Man Sam" if global.gameProgress<=4180 stringToShow="The one who wrote the Virus knew what he was doing. He knew what parts of the program to target and how to conceal entities from the program's identification system." else if global.gameProgress>=4190 stringToShow="Even though the Virus was removed, I'm still intrigued by it. I stand by my statement before. The guy that wrote it really knew his stuff, but scary that he hates this program that much." boxSize=3 if global.gameProgress<=1520 {instance_destroy()}

GID_SET(216222, self.id) visible=0 sprite_index=sPeteyPiranha; image_index=1; image_speed=0 talker="Petroleum" stringToShow="Don't forget to go back to previous areas with your new abilities. Check your map for places with collectibles. It displays where you're missing something." boxSize=3 if global.gameProgress<=1520 {instance_destroy()}

GID_SET(161270, self.id) sprite_index=sNPC_Matt_Idle talker="Matt" if global.gameProgress<=1070 stringToShow="The guy hiding himself in this house has the access code for the east." else if global.gameProgress>=1080 and global.gameProgress<=1530 stringToShow="I completely forgot that it was X that was in here. Sorry about that." else if global.gameProgress>=1540 and global.gameProgress<=1760 stringToShow="X headed out to the west for something. It must have been really important." else if global.gameProgress>=1770 and global.gameProgress<=3900 stringToShow="Damn, that sucks about X. He was a good friend to us. I hate this Virus and what it's doing." else if global.gameProgress>=3910 and global.gameProgress<=4500 stringToShow="I know X would have helped us during the CHAOS offensive on the city." else if global.gameProgress>=4510 stringToShow="That ship earlier had the CHAOS insignia on it. We're in some deep fried doo-doo if someone can't take that thing out." boxSize=2 storyCheck=1010 if global.gameProgress<=1020 {x+=48}

bStandOnly=true talker="Loitering Toad" if global.gameProgress<=2000 stringToShow="When you go out east, or south I think, there is a weird distortion the further you go. Bots can go through that 'fuzziness', but humans will have to turn around." else if global.gameProgress>=2010 stringToShow="It seems one of the humans here fixed the distortion out to the east. Probably not a good idea, some of the bots out there don't like humans in that area." boxSize=3

bStandOnly=true talker="Nervous Toad" stringToShow="You ever get that feeling like there might be too much of something?" boxSize=1
if global.gameProgress<=1080 {instance_destroy()}
